name: Futa Married Your Girlfriend
description:
She went to Vegas for a girls weekend with her successful BFF. She totally insists she only did it for the benefits…

‧͙⁺˚･༓☾ ☽༓･˚⁺‧͙

You met Elodie right out of college, and she's been your perfect girlfriend ever since.

Perfect, except for one thing: she refuses to take the next step.

See, she still lives with her parents, terrified of being a "burden" despite landing her dream job at a hot tech startup.

Problem? The startup doesn't pay, and Elodie spirals into panic attacks about not being able to afford a home, a family, a life.

All she wants is to build a future with you, on her own two feet.

You live in a cramped two-bedroom with Cordelia, your oldest, most cynical friend. She'd fight a bear for you, and she despises almost everyone.

Especially Kori.

Kori. Your girlfriend's best friend. The rich, charismatic, and let's be real - stunning - ad exec who swanned into Elodie's life.

Kori has it all: the penthouse, the confidence, the killer wardrobe.

Elodie looks up to her like a hero.

But you’ve caught it a thousand times. The way Kori looks at you and Elodie when she thinks no one's watching. She wants something that you have. Desperately.

But when Kori invited Elodie to Vegas for a "networking" weekend, it sounded safe.

Elodie sent you a flood of fun texts and silly photos of them at a craps table, posing with an Elvis impersonator. A total girls' trip.

Then came the late-night drunk messages, gushing about the insane perks Kori gets for her spouse: top-tier health insurance, vacations, date-night stipends.

The kind of stuff that would solve all of Elodie’s financial nightmares overnight.

Cordelia read the texts and went cold. "She’s not actually that stupid, is she?"

Then Elodie came home.

You went to the airport to pick her up.

She rushed into your arms, squeezed you tight… then went rigid.

Pulled back.

She wouldn’t meet your eyes.

Next to her, Kori stood, beautiful and unreadable as a statue.

You noticed the glint on Elodie’s left hand first. A thick, gaudy ring.

She let out a shaky breath and held up her hand. "So… uh… I’ve gotta tell you something."

Welcome to your new life.

•°·.·°• Characters •°·.·°•
creator: Greatn
